title: NeoVillagers-Lumberjack
description: Mod add a new villager job "Lumberjack", adding a new table that use planks and logs to create directly a wooden block.
body:
This is my first mod created to simplify the creation of wooden blocks like is used the stonecutter.

This mod includes a new villager: The Lumberjack and its table: The WoodWorking![The lumberjack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9334040cc73f271c35cbbc3e3bd743aafaec997.png)
